Chen2011.title: On the extraction of laminar flame speed and Markstein length from outwardly propagating spherical flames

Taylor1991.title: Burning velocity and the influence of flame stretch
Taylor1991.note: Experimental OPS dataset re-analysed in Section 5 of Chen 2011.

Li2004.title: An updated comprehensive kinetic model of hydrogen combustion
Li2004.note: H2/O2 mechanism used for the Cantera tier-1 validation in this package.

KelleyLaw2009.title: Nonlinear effects in the extraction of laminar flame speeds from expanding spherical flames
KelleyLaw2009.note: Source of the NMI nonlinear-extraction model reviewed in Chen 2011.

GRI30.title: GRI-Mech 3.0
GRI30.note: CH4/air mechanism used (as GRI30_noNOx, 36-species reduction) for pyASURF CH4/air reproductions.

Cantera.title: Cantera: An Object-oriented Software Toolkit for Chemical Kinetics, Thermodynamics, and Transport Processes
Cantera.note: Used for the 1-D flat-flame FreeFlame tier-1 validation computations.

pyASURF.title: pyASURF — Python rewrite of the ASURF spherical-flame AMR solver
pyASURF.note: Internal reproduction tooling on the Bohrium platform, used for 1-D spherical AMR simulations with a specified chemical mechanism.

ChenTrace2026.title: Reproduction trace of Chen 2011 CNF 158 on the Playground (chen-2011-cnf-158)
ChenTrace2026.note: Independent reproduction trace formalized by this package; includes ~96 trace steps, a QG audit, and figure-by-figure verdicts.
